title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable now - Allow Once [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: User denies location permission initially, then enables it with "Ask Next Time" option while keeping Find My Device screen visible in the background.
steps: Launch the app with the headset (HS) connected.
Navigate to the Find My Device screen.
Tap 'Don't Allow' when the permission dialog appears.
Verify that the permission dialog disappears and the Find My Device screen is still visible in the background.
Tap 'Enable Now' on the Find My Device screen.
When the location permission dialog appears, select 'Ask Next Time or When I Share'.
Verify that the permission dialog closes and the Find My Device screen remains visible in the background.
expected: All permission dialogs appear correctly at each step, and the Find My Device screen remains visible in the background throughout the flow.
